---
title: "Edmund Rodney Pollexfen Bastard"
---

## Edmund Rodney Pollexfen Bastard

**Dates:** (1825-1856)

### Description

landowner, Catholic convert

### Biography

Eldest son of Edmund Rodney Pollexfen Bastard (1784-1838) of Kitley, very near Puslinch, he converted to Rome and married (1853) Florence Mary Scrope (d. 1871) [LG 1952)

### Letters

- Letter from [late 1853?]
- Letter from 20 October [1850]
- Letter from March 14. 1849

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
